name: restaurant back office teams processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For restaurant back office teams processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes late payments and supplier penalties. We streamline manual invoice tracking instead of manual invoice processing.
target_audience: restaurant back office teams processing 10–20 invoices/month
